title: Mobile app version is changed
scenario: Verify that the updated mobile app version is correctly displayed across all relevant Lens tenant pages after a mobile user upgrades their app.
steps: 1. Ensure a software update is available for the mobile app.
2. On a mobile device, upgrade the mobile app to the latest version.
3. Log in to the Lens tenant as an administrator.
4. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
5. Navigate to the Inventory page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
6. Navigate to the Mobile profile page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
7. Navigate to the Device profile page and verify the new mobile app version is displayed correctly.
expected: The new mobile app version is correctly displayed on all relevant Lens tenant pages: the Device user/mobile user page, the Inventory page, the Mobile profile page, and the Device profile page.
